titleStmt.title: SII 38.226: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 226. (A.R. No. 226 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the east wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the Naṭarāja shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: It contains an order of the king to the trustees of the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Chandragiri-rājyam. It records that earlier the temple lands were given on lease to the tenants (employed by the temple) but the trustees (took over the land) and deprived them and the temple. The monthly worship and cow worship were also not properly conducted. The taxes were also misappropriated by the tanāttār of the temple (levied on the temple lands). The paṉmahēśvara and Vayirava-nāyanār petitioned the king to release the land and streamline the lease arrangement (for the restoration of temple worship). Accordingly the king issued an order to this effect and entrusted the same to the lease-holders. It was also ordered by the king that both paṉmahēśvara and Vayirava-nāyanār were to oversee the arrangement to collect all the taxes and deposit in the temple treasury and also to ensure all the offerings, rituals and daily worship be conducted regularly without fail.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . man Irājādhirāja Irājaparameśvara śrī virapradāpa devarāya mahārāyar cantirakiri
Irācciyam tiruoṟṟiūruṭaiyanāyaṉār koyiṟtāṉattāṟkku Irāya sam . palavaṅka varuṣam
ru vatil tiṅkaḷ tevastāṉam Atikāri kaṭaikkūṭṭina coṭi mukam pārvai Aṅkacālai campaṭam
vijeṣātāyam Ivaiyiṟṟileyum tevamaṇṭalam Ūravar civatakāṟar Atikāri kaṭaikkūṭṭiṉa tāṉattār
kuttakai koḷḷukaiālum Ivaiyiṟṟiṉ nālekuṭi Uḷḷatum kulaintu kopūcai tiṅkaṭtivatam
tiru ṭavarile kulaintu naṭakkutu Eṉṟu paṉmāyecurarum vayiravanāyiṉārum namakku viṇṇappam
ce ḷ Anta tevamaṇṭalaṅkaḷil Atikāri coṭimukam pārvai kaṭaikkūṭṭiṉa coṭi mukam
pārvai Aṅkacālaipaṭi viceṣātāyam Aricikāṇam nalerutu naṟpacu veṭṭi kaṭṭāyam Intavakaippaṭi Uḷḷa mutal
paṉmāyecuraraiyum vayiravanāyiṉāraiyum muṉ Iṭṭukkoṇṭu śrīpaṇṭārattile mutal Iṭṭutantom kopūcai
naṭattavum taṅkaḷ tevamaṇṭalam kuttokai ku kuttokai koṇṭa tiruṣettiṟamum viṭuvittu
tuṭṭi Uḷḷa mutalum śrī paṇṭārattile muta kaṇṭu paṉmāyecuraraiyum vayiravanāyaṉāraiyu
m muṉ Iṭṭukkoṇṭu makāpūcai tiruppaṇi tiṅkaṭtivatam nittiya pūcaiyum tāḻvaṟa Irāyar Irācatappaṭikkum Ariyappa taṇṇāyakkar ccatippaṭik
kum pikṣāviṟutti Ayyakaḷ Irācatappaṭikkum cantirakiriirācciyattil tevarāya Uṭaiyār tiruppaṭikkum Immatiyāti cantiraātittavaraiyum taṅkaḷ koyilu
kkum taṅkaḷ taḷippaṟṟukkum naṭattik koḷḷavum Itukku Akitam ceytavarkaḷ Uṇṭārākil keṅkaik karaiyiṟ kurāṟpacuvaik koṉṟāṉ pāvattileIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.226 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
